Thank you for contributing to BCApps.

Before requesting review, make sure this PR is linked to an approved issue and that you have personally validated the change.
If you used AI or agentic tooling, you are still responsible for reviewing, building, and testing the result before opening the PR.

Contribution guidelines: https://github.com/microsoft/BCApps/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md
Local development environment: https://github.com/microsoft/BCApps/blob/main/LOCAL_DEV_ENV.md
-->

## Work item(s)

Required:
- Link each approved GitHub issue with "Fixes #<issue number>".
- If an ADO work item is available, link it with "AB#<work item number>" or "Fixes AB#<work item number>".
-->

Fixes #

## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Product improvement
- [ ] New capability
- [ ] Refactoring or technical debt
- [ ] Tests only
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Build, pipeline, or tooling

## Impact

<!-- Fill in the affected areas. Use "N/A" when an area does not apply. -->

| Area | Details |
| --- | --- |
| App(s), module(s), or project(s) changed | |
| User-visible behavior | |
| Data model, schema, or upgrade impact | |
| Permissions, entitlements, or security impact | |
| Public API, integration event, or extensibility impact | |
| Translations, captions, or documentation impact | |

## Validation performed

<!--
Do not leave this blank. If a check is not applicable, explain why in the evidence table below.
PRs that only rely on generated code or CI without local/human validation are not ready for review.
-->

- [ ] I personally reviewed the full diff and removed unrelated/generated noise.
- [ ] If AI or agentic tooling was used, I reviewed, built, and tested the generated changes before requesting review.
- [ ] I compiled the affected app(s) or project(s).
- [ ] I ran the relevant code analyzers with no new warnings.
- [ ] I ran existing automated tests affected by this change.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for changed behavior, or explained why no test change is needed.
- [ ] I manually exercised the changed scenario in Business Central when UI, API, posting, setup, or background behavior changed.
- [ ] I verified no unrelated `app.json` version or dependency changes were introduced.

| Validation | Evidence |
| --- | --- |
| Commands or pipeline runs | |
| Automated tests | |
| Manual scenarios | |
| Not run / not applicable | |
